idp_dev001.objectives: Transition from senior engineer to technical team lead with focus on team management, architectural decisions, and mentoring junior team members.
milestones: Month 4: Lead first significant architecture review
Month 14: Present at company tech talk

idp_pm001.objectives: Develop project management expertise to transition into PM role. Focus on planning, stakeholder management, and agile methodologies.
milestones: Month 3: Co-lead project planning for major initiative
Month 6: Lead retrospectives and team meetings
Month 9: Manage stakeholder communication for key projects
Month 12: Demonstrate readiness for PM promotion
